content.text: Commit landed (`4fd80ae`). There's a non-fatal trunk warning about the chained hook callback, but the commit succeeded. Let me verify the trailer was injected and a checkpoint was actually created — and reconcile the branch name shown.

input.command: cd /Users/elvis/Documents/ai/gtm-sdk; echo "=== current branch ==="; git branch --show-current; echo "=== HEAD full message (trailer?) ==="; git log -1 --format='%B' HEAD; echo "=== checkpoint list ==="; entire checkpoint list 2>&1 | head -20; echo "=== session current ==="; entire session current 2>&1 | grep -i checkpoint
input.description: Verify trailer injection and checkpoint creation
